## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] I followed the architectural constraints in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) (stdlib only, hooks exit 0, AI calls via IDE CLIs, MCP stdout protocol-only, no `.env` reads)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
